name: Old Fashioned Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add sugar 1/3 cup at a time, creaming well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla, lemon extract, juice, and rind.
6. Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
7. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk. Stir thoroughly after each addition.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean (70-80 minutes).
10. Cool for 20 minutes before removing from pan.
